passives.name: Opportunist
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the Light Armor skill line by 15%. Increases your Alliance Points gained by 1%.

passives.name: Spell Attunement
passives.description: Increases your Spell Resistance by 2310. This effect is doubled if you are afflicted with Burning, Chilled, or Concussed. Increases your Magicka Recovery by 130.

passives.name: Magicka Mastery
passives.description: Reduces the Magicka cost of your abilities by 7%.
